tile.title: ABI/Inform
tile.description:
Business research database providing scholarly articles, trade publications, company
profiles, industry reports, and business news. Supports research in management, finance,
accounting, marketing, entrepreneurship, and economics.
tile.topic: Company & Organization Data, Financial & Market Data, Market Research

tile.title: Ad*Access
tile.description:
Digital archive of historical U.S. and Canadian advertisements from 1911 to 1955. Useful
for research on marketing, consumer culture, media history, visual design, and advertising
trends.
tile.topic: Market Research, Historical Archives
tile.access-note: Requires users to register for an account with a valid Yale email address.

tile.title: Advertising Age
tile.description:
News and analysis platform covering advertising, marketing, media, agencies, and brand
strategy. Supports research on marketing trends, campaign strategy, and advertising
industry developments.
tile.topic: Market Research, News & Current Events, Government & International Statistics

tile.title: American City Business Journals
tile.description:
Collection of local business news, company information, and economic reporting from major
U.S. metropolitan areas. Useful for regional business, entrepreneurship, and economic
development research.
tile.topic: Company & Organization Data, News & Current Events, Government & International Statistics
tile.access-note: Requires users to request an individual account with a Yale email address.

tile.title: American Energy Society
tile.description:
Energy information platform providing industry news, reports, white papers, podcasts, and
market intelligence. Supports research on energy markets, climate policy, technology, and
sustainability.
tile.topic: News & Current Events, ESG & Sustainability Data, Data Platform
tile.access-note:
New users will need to register for an individual account using a valid Yale email address
.

tile.title: Associations Unlimited
tile.description:
Directory of professional, trade, cultural, labor, and nonprofit organizations in the
United States and abroad. Useful for identifying associations, professional networks, and
organizational contacts.
tile.topic: Company & Organization Data, Trade & Supply Chain Data, Workforce & Career Data
tile.access-note:
Descriptions and contact information for over 500 membership organizations from around the
world, including professional and trade associations, labor unions, and cultural
organizations. Included titles: Encyclopedia of Associations: National Organizations of
the U.S., Encyclopedia of Associations: International Organizations, and Encyclopedia of
Associations: Regional, State & Local Associations .

tile.title: Audit Analytics
tile.description:
Database of corporate disclosures, audit information, accounting practices, regulatory
filings, and compliance activity. Supports research in accounting, corporate governance,
financial reporting, and regulation.
tile.topic: Financial & Market Data, News & Current Events, Data Platform
tile.access-note:
Available via WRDS or the Audit Analytics website. Both options require users to register
for an account with a valid Yale email address.

tile.title: BBC Research
tile.description:
Market research platform covering emerging technologies, healthcare, energy, materials,
biotechnology, and industrial sectors. Useful for technology forecasting, industry
analysis, and market assessment.
tile.topic: Market Research, Health & Biomedical Data, Data Platform

tile.title: Bloomberg Terminal
tile.description:
Professional financial data platform providing real-time market data, company information,
economic indicators, analytics, and news. Widely used for investment, finance, and
economic research.
tile.topic: Company & Organization Data, Financial & Market Data, News & Current Events
tile.access-note: Available on dedicated workstations located at Marx Library and the School of Management.

tile.title: Bloomberg.com
tile.description:
News and data platform covering global markets, business, economics, politics, technology,
and policy. Supports research on current events, financial markets, and business trends.
tile.topic: Financial & Market Data, News & Current Events, Real Estate & Property Data
tile.access-note:
Requires users to register for an individual account with a Yale email
address.Bloomberg.com accounts are reset annually after the spring semester. Returning
users may need to re-register with their @yale.edu address at that time.

tile.title: Business Insider
tile.description:
Digital news platform featuring reporting on business, technology, finance, careers, and
global affairs. Useful for tracking companies, industries, labor markets, and emerging
business trends.
tile.topic: Company & Organization Data, Financial & Market Data, News & Current Events
tile.access-note: Requires users to register for an account with a Yale email address.

tile.title: Business of Fashion Professional
tile.description:
Industry intelligence platform covering global fashion markets, companies, retail
strategy, and consumer trends. Supports research on fashion business, luxury markets, and
brand strategy.
tile.topic: Company & Organization Data, Market Research, Data Platform
tile.access-note:
Requires users to register for an account with a Yale email address. The campus
subscription does not include access to BoF Insights reports.

tile.title: Business Source Ultimate
tile.description:
Comprehensive business database providing scholarly journals, trade publications, industry
reports, SWOT analyses, case studies, and company profiles. Supports research across
business disciplines.
tile.topic: Company & Organization Data, Scholarly Indexes & Literature, Trade & Supply Chain Data

tile.title: Caixin Global
tile.description:
English-language news source covering Chinese business, finance, economics, politics, and
public policy. Useful for research on China's economy, markets, and regulatory
environment.
tile.topic: Financial & Market Data, News & Current Events
tile.access-note: Requires users to register for an individual account with a Yale email address for access.

tile.title: Calcbench
tile.description:
Financial statement database built from SEC XBRL filings of public companies. Supports
accounting, auditing, financial analysis, and corporate reporting research.
tile.topic: Company & Organization Data, Financial & Market Data, News & Current Events
tile.access-note: Requires users to register for an individual account with a Yale email address for access.

tile.title: Capital IQ
tile.description:
Financial intelligence platform providing company financials, transactions, ownership
data, market information, and professional profiles worldwide. Widely used for business,
investment, and economic research.
tile.topic: Company & Organization Data, Financial & Market Data, Data Platform
tile.access-note:
Requires registering an individual account with a Yale email address. Individuals who do
not want to create an individual account can use S&P NetAdvantage for similar
functionality.

tile.title: Carbon Pulse
tile.description:
News and intelligence platform covering carbon markets, emissions trading, greenhouse gas
pricing, climate policy, and sustainability initiatives. Supports environmental economics
and climate governance research.
tile.topic: News & Current Events, ESG & Sustainability Data, Data Platform
tile.access-note: Requires users to register for an individual account with a Yale email address for access.

tile.title: CB Insights
tile.description:
Database tracking startups, investors, venture capital activity, funding rounds,
acquisitions, and emerging industries. Useful for entrepreneurship, innovation, and
technology market research.
tile.topic: Financial & Market Data, Market Research, Data Platform
tile.access-note:
Requires users to register for an account using a Yale email address. Note: Expert
Intelligence reports are not available with academic or university accounts.

tile.title: CDP Climate Data
tile.description:
Company-reported environmental and climate disclosure data covering emissions,
sustainability practices, and supply-chain activity. Supports ESG, climate risk, and
corporate sustainability research.
tile.topic: Company & Organization Data, ESG & Sustainability Data

tile.title: CEIC Data
tile.description:
Global economic and financial database containing macroeconomic, sector, regional, and
alternative data from official and commercial sources. Supports comparative economic and
policy research.
tile.topic: Financial & Market Data, Data Platform

tile.title: Centralbanking.com
tile.description:
Information resource focused on central banking, monetary policy, financial stability,
banking regulation, and financial technologies. Useful for research on economic policy and
financial systems.
tile.topic: Financial & Market Data

tile.title: Conference Board
tile.description:
Source for economic indicators, business research, and management intelligence. Supports
research on economic conditions, consumer confidence, workforce trends, and organizational
performance.
tile.topic: Company & Organization Data, Market Research, Government & International Statistics
tile.access-note:
Off-campus users must be logged in to Yale’s VPN OR must create an account with their
@yale.edu email address.

tile.title: CoreLogic
tile.description:
Property, mortgage, deed, tax, and real estate market database covering U.S. housing
markets. Supports research in housing, urban economics, finance, and real estate.
tile.topic: Financial & Market Data, Survey & Polling Data, Real Estate & Property Data

tile.title: Crunchbase
tile.description:
Database of private and public companies, investors, funding rounds, acquisitions, and
startup activity. Supports research on entrepreneurship, innovation ecosystems, and
venture capital.
tile.topic: Company & Organization Data, Financial & Market Data, Data Platform
tile.access-note:
Data is available by request. Use the access link in the Quicksearch record to get
started.

tile.title: Data Axle
tile.description:
Business directory containing current and historical information on millions of U.S. and
Canadian companies. Useful for business demographics, market analysis, and geographic
research.
tile.topic: Company & Organization Data, News & Current Events, Geospatial & Mapping Data

tile.title: Data Explr
tile.description:
Historical database of U.S. private companies with information on sales, employment,
industry classification, location, and ownership. Supports longitudinal business and
economic research.
tile.topic: Company & Organization Data, Geospatial & Mapping Data, Historical Archives
tile.access-note:
Data for 1981 and 1984 are not available. An individual Data Exlpr account is required to
access this data.

tile.title: Datacenter Knowledgebase (451 Research)
tile.description:
Global database of data center facilities, infrastructure, capacity, utilization, and
market activity. Useful for research on cloud computing, digital infrastructure, and
technology markets.
tile.topic: Data Platform
tile.access-note: Requires users to request an individual account with a Yale email address.

tile.title: Datastream
tile.description:
Historical financial database containing securities prices, economic indicators,
commodities, bonds, and market data. Supports quantitative finance, investment analysis,
and economic research.
tile.topic: Financial & Market Data, Government & International Statistics, Historical Archives

tile.title: Dewey Data
tile.description:
Platform providing access to licensed third-party research datasets across healthcare,
workforce, consumer behavior, transportation, and other domains. Useful for discovering
specialized datasets.
tile.topic: Market Research, Health & Biomedical Data, Workforce & Career Data
tile.access-note: Click "Sign in" and enter your yale.edu email address.

tile.title: eCommerceDB
tile.description:
Global e-commerce database covering online retailers, revenue, market development,
competitors, traffic, and digital commerce indicators. Supports retail, consumer behavior,
and digital economy research.
tile.topic: Market Research, Government & International Statistics, Data Platform
tile.access-note: Also accessible via Statista.

tile.title: EconLit
tile.description:
Comprehensive index of economics literature including journal articles, books, working
papers, dissertations, conference proceedings, and reviews. Supports scholarly research in
economics and related fields.
tile.topic: Scholarly Indexes & Literature

tile.title: EIU Viewpoint
tile.description:
Political and economic intelligence platform providing country analysis, forecasts, policy
insights, and risk assessments. Useful for international business, public policy, and
global market research.
tile.topic: Market Research, Government & International Statistics, Data Platform

tile.title: eMarketer
tile.description:
Market data and analysis platform focused on digital advertising, social media,
e-commerce, retail, and consumer technology. Supports research on digital markets and
media trends.
tile.topic: Financial & Market Data, Market Research, Data Platform

tile.title: EMIS
tile.description:
Market intelligence platform providing company, industry, country, and news data for
emerging and established markets. Supports global business, market, and economic research.
tile.topic: Company & Organization Data, News & Current Events, Government & International Statistics
tile.access-note: If you are prompted to login, select the Guest Access option.

tile.title: Esri Business Analyst
tile.description:
Web-based GIS and market analysis platform with demographic, consumer, employment, and
location data. Supports spatial analysis, site selection, and market research.
tile.topic: Market Research, Geospatial & Mapping Data, Workforce & Career Data
tile.access-note:
Requires an individual account. For more information and to request an account, visit:
Online Mapping Resources: Esri Business Analyst Web Apps.

tile.title: Factiva
tile.description:
Global news database with current and archival coverage from newspapers, magazines,
newswires, and business sources. Supports news, company, industry, and policy research.
tile.topic: Company & Organization Data, News & Current Events, Real Estate & Property Data
tile.access-note: Per our license agreement, Factiva may not be used for text mining projects.

tile.title: FactSet
tile.description:
Financial data and analytics platform covering global companies, markets, securities,
estimates, and economic data. Supports investment research, financial modeling, and market
analysis.
tile.topic: Company & Organization Data, Financial & Market Data, Data Platform
tile.access-note:
Access to FactSet is made possible by Yale School of Management. FactSet Workstation is
available for Faculty & PhD Students.

tile.title: Finaeon
tile.description:
Historical financial and economic time-series database covering countries, markets,
exchange rates, interest rates, commodities, inflation, and securities. Supports long-run
financial and economic research.
tile.topic: Financial & Market Data, Historical Archives, Data Platform

tile.title: Financial Times
tile.description:
Digital news source covering global business, finance, economics, politics, and markets.
Useful for current awareness and research on international business and economic issues.
tile.topic: Financial & Market Data, News & Current Events, Government & International Statistics

tile.title: Foundation Directory Online Professional
tile.description:
Database of U.S. foundations, grantmakers, corporate giving programs, public charities,
grants, and IRS filings. Supports philanthropy, nonprofit, and funding research.
tile.topic: Company & Organization Data, Data Platform

tile.title: Frost and Sullivan
tile.description:
Market research platform covering technology, healthcare, transportation, defense,
chemicals, electronics, communications, and other industries. Useful for industry analysis
and market forecasting.
tile.topic: Market Research, Health & Biomedical Data, Data Platform

tile.title: Gale Business Insights
tile.description:
Business information platform providing company profiles, SWOT analyses, industry
coverage, market share data, histories, chronologies, and articles. Supports company and
industry research.
tile.topic: Company & Organization Data, Market Research, Data Platform

tile.title: Gallup Analytics
tile.description:
Polling and survey data platform covering U.S. and global public opinion. Supports
research on attitudes, behavior, social trends, and cross-national comparisons.
tile.topic: Survey & Polling Data, Data Platform
tile.form: Yale subscribes to individual response data contact researchdata@yale.edu for access.

tile.title: Gartner
tile.description:
Information technology research platform providing reports, analysis, and trends on IT
markets, vendors, and strategy. Supports technology management and digital transformation
research.
tile.topic: Data Platform

tile.title: Global Development Finance
tile.description:
World Bank dataset on financial flows, external debt, and financial indicators for
developing countries. Supports research on development finance and international economic
conditions.
tile.topic: Financial & Market Data, Government & International Statistics

tile.title: GlobalData Medical and Pharmaceutical Intelligence Centers
tile.description:
Market research platform covering medical device and pharmaceutical industries. Supports
research on healthcare markets, drug development, competitive intelligence, and industry
trends.
tile.topic: Market Research, Government & International Statistics, Health & Biomedical Data

tile.title: GoinGlobal
tile.description:
Career and employment information platform with country guides, job search resources, visa
information, salary data, and workplace advice. Supports global career and labor market
research.
tile.topic: Market Research, Government & International Statistics, Workforce & Career Data

tile.title: GuideStar Pro
tile.description:
Nonprofit organization database with information on programs, finances, leadership, and
IRS filings. Useful for nonprofit, philanthropy, civic sector, and organizational
research.
tile.topic: Company & Organization Data, Financial & Market Data, Data Platform
tile.access-note:
For assistance with downloading lists with more than 1000 results, please contact
business.reference@yale.edu.

tile.title: Handbooks in Economics
tile.description:
Full-text collection of scholarly handbooks in economics, finance, econometrics, and
related fields. Supports literature review and advanced disciplinary research.
tile.topic: Financial & Market Data, Scholarly Indexes & Literature

tile.title: Harvard Business Publishing eBooks Collection
tile.description:
Ebook collection covering management, leadership, entrepreneurship, strategy, human
resources, and related business topics. Useful for teaching, professional development, and
business research.
tile.topic: Company & Organization Data, Government & International Statistics, Scholarly Indexes & Literature

tile.title: IBISWorld
tile.description:
Industry research platform with reports on market size, trends, performance, risks, major
companies, and forecasts. Supports industry analysis, business planning, and market
research.
tile.topic: Company & Organization Data, Market Research, Data Platform
tile.access-note:
Due to licensing restrictions with IBISWorld, users are limited to fewer than 50 downloads
per session. Exceeding this limit may result in a university-wide loss of access to this
resource.

tile.title: IEA Statistics Package
tile.description:
Energy statistics resource from the International Energy Agency. Supports research on
energy production, consumption, trade, prices, and energy policy across countries.
tile.topic: Financial & Market Data, Market Research, Government & International Statistics

tile.title: ImpactAlpha
tile.description:
News and analysis source covering impact investing, sustainable finance, social
enterprise, and market-based approaches to social change. Supports ESG and social impact
research.
tile.topic: Financial & Market Data, News & Current Events, ESG & Sustainability Data
tile.access-note: Requires users to register for an individual account with a Yale email address.

tile.title: Indiastat
tile.description:
Statistical database providing India-specific socioeconomic, industry, demographic, and
government data. Supports regional, policy, development, and market research on India.
tile.topic: Market Research, Government & International Statistics, Data Platform

tile.title: Inside Philanthropy
tile.description:
News and information platform covering foundations, major donors, grantmaking,
philanthropy jobs, and funding opportunities. Supports research on philanthropy and
nonprofit funding.
tile.topic: Company & Organization Data, News & Current Events, Workforce & Career Data
tile.access-note: Requires users to register for an individual account.

tile.title: International Financial Statistics - IMF
tile.description:
IMF statistical database covering international and domestic finance, monetary indicators,
exchange rates, prices, production, and national accounts. Supports macroeconomic and
international finance research.
tile.topic: Financial & Market Data, Market Research, Government & International Statistics

tile.title: JSTOR
tile.description:
Digital archive of scholarly journals, books, and primary sources across many disciplines.
Supports literature reviews and historical research in business and related fields.
tile.topic: Scholarly Indexes & Literature, Historical Archives

tile.title: Kanopy
tile.description:
Streaming video platform offering educational films and documentaries across a range of
subject areas. Useful for teaching, course support, and media-based research.
tile.topic: Data Platform

tile.title: Leadership Connect
tile.description:
Directory of leaders and organizations in business, government, and nonprofit sectors in
the United States. Useful for contact research and organizational mapping.
tile.topic: Company & Organization Data, Geospatial & Mapping Data
tile.access-note:
Requires users to sign in with an @Yale.edu email address. Users will be directed to the
Yale CAS sign-in page. Note: The export function is not available with our subscription.

tile.title: LSEG
tile.description:
Financial markets platform providing company financials, filings, estimates, transactions,
market data, and analyst research. Supports investment, corporate finance, and market
research.
tile.topic: Company & Organization Data, Financial & Market Data, Market Research
tile.access-note: Requires users to register for an individual account.

tile.title: LSEG Tick History
tile.description:
Historical intraday market data source with time-and-sales, quotes, and market-depth data
for futures. Supports high-frequency finance and market microstructure research.
tile.topic: Financial & Market Data, Historical Archives
tile.access-note: email to request access: business.reference@yale.edu

tile.title: Making of the Modern World
tile.description:
Digital archive of economic and business literature published from 1450 through 1850.
Supports historical research on commerce, political economy, and social thought.
tile.topic: Scholarly Indexes & Literature, Historical Archives

tile.title: Market Research & American Business, 1935-1965
tile.description:
Digital archive of market research reports and consumer studies from mid-twentieth-century
American business. Supports research on advertising, consumer culture, and business
history.
tile.topic: Market Research, Historical Archives

tile.title: MarketResearch.com Academic
tile.description:
Market research platform providing reports on consumer, demographic, lifestyle,
industrial, and product markets. Supports industry analysis, market sizing, and consumer
research.
tile.topic: Market Research, Data Platform

tile.title: Media Radar 360
tile.description:
Advertising intelligence platform covering advertising expenditures across television,
radio, magazines, newspapers, and other media. Supports media planning and advertising
market research.
tile.topic: Market Research, News & Current Events, Data Platform

tile.title: Mergent Archives
tile.description:
Historical corporate document archive including corporate manuals, municipal manuals, and
annual reports. Supports company history, financial history, and archival business
research.
tile.topic: Company & Organization Data, Financial & Market Data, Historical Archives

tile.title: Mergent Intellect
tile.description:
Global business directory with public and private company data, executive contacts, and
industry research from D&B Hoovers. Supports company and market research.
tile.topic: Company & Organization Data, Market Research

tile.title: Mergent Municipal Bond Database
tile.description:
Dataset of municipal bond attributes with historical coverage dating back several decades.
Supports fixed income, public finance, and municipal market research.
tile.topic: Financial & Market Data, Market Research, Historical Archives

tile.title: Mintel GNPD
tile.description:
Global product database tracking new consumer packaged goods across food, beverage,
household, beauty, health, and pet sectors. Supports product innovation and market
research.
tile.topic: Market Research, Health & Biomedical Data, Data Platform
tile.access-note:
Requires users to create a profile using your @yale.edu email address. Find step-by-step
instructions for accessing Mintel GNPD in Yale Business Answers Now.

tile.title: Mintel Reports
tile.description:
Consumer market research platform with reports on U.S. and global markets, consumer
attitudes, segmentation, and purchasing behavior. Supports marketing and consumer
research.
tile.topic: Market Research, Data Platform

tile.title: Moody's CRE
tile.description:
Commercial real estate database with property data, rent levels, vacancy rates, sales
comparables, forecasts, and market trends. Supports real estate and urban economics
research.
tile.topic: Survey & Polling Data, Real Estate & Property Data, Data Platform
tile.access-note: Requires users to request an individual account with a Yale email address.

tile.title: Moody's Default & Recovery Database
tile.description:
Credit risk database covering ratings, defaults, and recovery data for global sovereign
and corporate debt securities. Supports fixed income and credit risk research.
tile.topic: Financial & Market Data, Data Platform
tile.access-note: Requires users to request an individual account with a Yale email address.

tile.title: Morningstar Direct
tile.description:
Investment database and analytics platform covering funds, indexes, portfolios, ownership,
and performance data worldwide. Supports investment analysis and asset management
research.
tile.topic: Company & Organization Data, Financial & Market Data, Data Platform
tile.access-note: Available at Marx Library on a dedicated workstation.

tile.title: New York Times
tile.description:
Digital news source providing current and archival reporting on politics, business,
culture, science, and global affairs. Supports current awareness and news research.
tile.topic: News & Current Events, Real Estate & Property Data

tile.title: Nexis Uni
tile.description:
Full-text news, business, legal, and company information database. Supports research using
newspapers, magazines, transcripts, legal sources, and company profiles.
tile.topic: Company & Organization Data, News & Current Events, Data Platform

tile.title: OECD iLibrary
tile.description:
OECD platform providing books, reports, journals, and statistical data on economics,
policy, development, education, environment, and society. Supports comparative policy
research.
tile.topic: Government & International Statistics, Scholarly Indexes & Literature, Data Platform

tile.title: Orbis
tile.description:
Global company database covering public and private firms, ownership structures,
financials, and corporate relationships. Valuable for international business and
organizational research.
tile.topic: Company & Organization Data, Financial & Market Data, Government & International Statistics
tile.access-note: Point in-time historical data available by request

tile.title: Orbis Historical
tile.description:
Historical company dataset from Orbis providing point-in-time information for longitudinal
business research. Supports analysis of firm characteristics, ownership, and financial
data over time.
tile.topic: Company & Organization Data, Financial & Market Data, Historical Archives

tile.title: Orbis Intellectual Property
tile.description:
Patent and company intelligence platform linking global patent data to corporate
information. Supports research on innovation, intellectual property, technology strategy,
and firms.
tile.topic: Company & Organization Data, Survey & Polling Data, Real Estate & Property Data

tile.title: Panjiva
tile.description:
Global trade database with import and export records, suppliers, buyers, products, and
shipment trends. Supports supply chain, trade, and sourcing research.
tile.topic: Market Research, Trade & Supply Chain Data, Data Platform
tile.access-note: Requires users to request an individual account with a Yale email address.

tile.title: Passport
tile.description:
Market research platform from Euromonitor with consumer, industry, country, and market
data. Supports international market analysis, consumer trends, and business research.
tile.topic: Financial & Market Data, Market Research, Government & International Statistics

tile.title: Pharmaprojects
tile.description:
Pharmaceutical research and development database tracking drugs by company, disease,
therapeutic class, and development phase. Supports drug pipeline and biomedical market
research.
tile.topic: Company & Organization Data, Market Research, Government & International Statistics
tile.access-note: Requires users to register for an individual account.

tile.title: Pitchbook
tile.description:
Private capital database covering companies, investors, funds, deals, exits, and service
providers. Supports venture capital, private equity, and entrepreneurship research.
tile.topic: Company & Organization Data, Financial & Market Data, Data Platform
tile.access-note:
Requires users to sign in with an @Yale.edu email address. Users will be directed to the
Yale CAS sign-in page. Do not click "Log in without SSO" even if you had an individual
account previously. Commercial use is prohibited. Users are limited to 10 downloads per
day and 25 downloads per month. (1 download = 1 row of data on an Excel file). Accounts
will automatically be reset annually on May 31.

tile.title: PolicyMap
tile.description:
Interactive mapping platform combining demographic, housing, health, economic, and policy
data from public and proprietary sources. Supports place-based research and spatial
analysis.
tile.topic: Geospatial & Mapping Data, Real Estate & Property Data, Health & Biomedical Data

tile.title: Political Risk Yearbook
tile.description:
Country risk publication providing political, financial, and economic risk assessments for
international business and investment. Supports global strategy and policy research.
tile.topic: Financial & Market Data, Government & International Statistics

tile.title: Politico Pro
tile.description:
Policy intelligence platform covering legislative, regulatory, and political developments,
including energy and environment news. Supports government, policy, and advocacy research.
tile.topic: News & Current Events, Government & International Statistics, Geospatial & Mapping Data

tile.title: Preqin
tile.description:
Alternative assets database covering private equity, private debt, real estate,
infrastructure, natural resources, and hedge funds. Supports private markets and
investment research.
tile.topic: Financial & Market Data, Real Estate & Property Data, Data Platform
tile.access-note: Private data from Preqin is available in WRDS.

tile.title: PrivCo
tile.description:
Business and financial database focused on major private companies, including
venture-backed, family-owned, and private-equity-owned firms. Supports private company and
market research.
tile.topic: Company & Organization Data, Financial & Market Data, Market Research
tile.access-note: Requires users to sign up for an account using a Yale email address.

tile.title: ProQuest Dissertations & Theses Global
tile.description:
Comprehensive database of dissertations and theses from universities worldwide. Supports
literature reviews, graduate research, and discovery of emerging scholarship.
tile.topic: Scholarly Indexes & Literature, Data Platform

tile.title: Proquest Historical Annual Reports
tile.description:
Digital archive of annual reports from major North American companies over more than a
century. Supports corporate history, financial history, and business research.
tile.topic: Company & Organization Data, Financial & Market Data, Historical Archives

tile.title: Proquest Statistical Abstract of the U.S.
tile.description:
Statistical reference source summarizing U.S. demographic, economic, political, and social
data. Supports quick access to national statistics and historical context.
tile.topic: Government & International Statistics, Scholarly Indexes & Literature, Historical Archives

tile.title: Pyrra Discovery Platform
tile.description:
Research platform for monitoring online narratives, emerging communities, and digital
information environments. Supports analysis of public discourse, media ecosystems, and
online activity.
tile.topic: Data Platform

tile.title: RKMA Market Research Handbook Series
tile.description:
Downloadable market research handbooks covering consumer behavior, media, travel, retail,
food, healthcare, sports, and related sectors. Supports industry and market analysis.
tile.topic: Market Research, Health & Biomedical Data

tile.title: Roper iPOLL
tile.description:
Public opinion database of U.S. national survey questions and responses dating back to
1935. Supports polling, political behavior, and social trends research.
tile.topic: Survey & Polling Data, Historical Archives, Data Platform

tile.title: S&P Capital IQ Pro
tile.description:
Financial intelligence platform providing company, industry, market, credit, energy, and
real estate data. Supports investment, corporate finance, and industry research.
tile.topic: Company & Organization Data, Financial & Market Data, Market Research
tile.access-note:
Requires users to register for an individual account. Current Capital IQ account holders
can access the platform directly using the S&P Capital IQ Pro link in the upper right
corner of the Captial IQ page.

tile.title: S&P NetAdvantage
tile.description:
Business research platform with company profiles, financials, industry surveys, stock
reports, and screening tools. Supports company, industry, and investment research.
tile.topic: Company & Organization Data, Financial & Market Data, Survey & Polling Data

tile.title: S&P RatingsDirect (Available through S&P Capital IQ)
tile.description:
Credit research platform providing S&P ratings, reports, and analysis for global bond
issues. Supports fixed income, credit risk, and public finance research.
tile.topic: Financial & Market Data, Data Platform
tile.access-note:
To access, login to Capital IQ and select the Ratings Direct search option. Requires new
users to register for an account.

tile.title: Sage Business Cases
tile.description:
Collection of business case studies from global publishers and universities. Supports
classroom teaching and research in management, entrepreneurship, healthcare, and social
enterprise.
tile.topic: Health & Biomedical Data
tile.access-note:
Sage Business Cases are licensed for all Yale affiliates and can be used for classroom
teaching.

tile.title: Scopus
tile.description:
Academic abstract and citation database covering peer-reviewed journals, conference
proceedings, and books across scientific, medical, technical, and social science fields.
Supports literature review and citation analysis.
tile.topic: Scholarly Indexes & Literature, Health & Biomedical Data, Data Platform

tile.title: SDC Platinum
tile.description:
Transaction database covering new issues, bonds, syndicated loans, mergers and
acquisitions, governance, private equity, and infrastructure. Supports corporate finance
and deal research.
tile.topic: Financial & Market Data, Data Platform
tile.access-note: Available by request on LSEG Workpsace or WRDS.

tile.title: SimplyAnalytics
tile.description:
Web-based mapping and data platform with census, consumer, market, and local demographic
data. Supports geographic analysis, market research, and community studies.
tile.topic: Market Research, Geospatial & Mapping Data, Data Platform

tile.title: Social Explorer
tile.description:
Interactive mapping and data platform providing demographic and census data for the United
States. Supports historical, spatial, and community-level research.
tile.topic: Geospatial & Mapping Data, Historical Archives, Data Platform

tile.title: Social Science Research Network (SSRN)
tile.description:
Repository of working papers, accepted papers, and abstracts across social science
disciplines. Supports discovery of current research in accounting, economics, finance,
marketing, and law.
tile.topic: Financial & Market Data, Market Research, News & Current Events

tile.title: Sports Business Research Network (SBRnet)
tile.description:
Sports market research platform with consumer, industry, participation, sponsorship, and
expenditure data. Supports sports business, marketing, and consumer behavior research.
tile.topic: Market Research, Data Platform

tile.title: STAT+
tile.description:
News and analysis platform covering biotechnology, pharmaceuticals, clinical trials,
health policy, and healthcare business. Supports research on biomedical innovation and
health industry trends.
tile.topic: News & Current Events, Health & Biomedical Data, Data Platform
tile.access-note: Requires users to register for an individual account with a Yale email address.

tile.title: Statista
tile.description:
Statistics portal aggregating data, charts, infographics, dossiers, and reports from
thousands of sources. Supports quick fact-finding, market research, and data
visualization.
tile.topic: Market Research, Government & International Statistics

tile.title: Sustainable Views
tile.description:
Financial Times publication covering sustainable finance, ESG policy, regulation, and
market trends. Supports research on sustainability, investment, and corporate
responsibility.
tile.topic: Financial & Market Data, News & Current Events, ESG & Sustainability Data
tile.access-note: Requires users to request an individual account with a Yale email address.

tile.title: The Block Pro
tile.description:
Research and data platform covering digital assets, cryptocurrency markets, blockchain
companies, and industry trends. Supports research on crypto, fintech, and decentralized
finance.
tile.topic: Company & Organization Data, Financial & Market Data, Data Platform
tile.access-note: Requires users to register for an account with a valid Yale email address.

tile.title: The Economist
tile.description:
Current and archival magazine source covering world affairs, economics, business,
politics, science, and culture. Supports current awareness and international policy
research.
tile.topic: News & Current Events, Government & International Statistics, Real Estate & Property Data
tile.access-note: Requires users to register for an individual account with a Yale email address for access.

tile.title: The Information
tile.description:
Technology business news source with reporting on companies, startups, platforms, venture
capital, and digital markets. Supports research on technology industries and strategy.
tile.topic: Company & Organization Data, Financial & Market Data, News & Current Events
tile.access-note:
Requires users to register for an individual account with a Yale email address. Please
note: The Information Pro content is not included with academic or university
subscriptions.

tile.title: UN Comtrade Premium
tile.description:
International trade database providing detailed commodity and partner-country statistics
reported by national authorities. Supports trade, supply chain, and economic research.
tile.topic: Government & International Statistics, Trade & Supply Chain Data, Data Platform

tile.title: UNdata
tile.description:
United Nations statistical portal combining data from multiple UN databases. Supports
cross-national research on demographics, economics, development, environment, and society.
tile.topic: Government & International Statistics, Data Platform

tile.title: Vault
tile.description:
Career research platform with employer profiles, industry guides, rankings, interview
advice, and job search resources. Supports career exploration and labor market research.
tile.topic: Market Research, Workforce & Career Data, Data Platform
tile.access-note: Current students, faculty, and staff can log in to Vault with their NetID.

tile.title: VitalLaw - Blue Chip Publications
tile.description:
Economic forecasting resource providing Blue Chip consensus forecasts and archived
indicators in Excel and PDF formats. Supports macroeconomic, financial, and forecasting
research.
tile.topic: Financial & Market Data, Government & International Statistics, Historical Archives
tile.access-note: Requires users to register for an account with a Yale email address for access.

tile.title: Wall Street Journal Online
tile.description:
Digital newspaper covering business, finance, markets, politics, technology, and global
news. Supports current awareness and business news research.
tile.topic: Financial & Market Data, News & Current Events, Scholarly Indexes & Literature

tile.title: WARC
tile.description:
Advertising and marketing intelligence platform with case studies, best practices, brand
insights, and industry analysis. Supports marketing strategy, media, and consumer
research.
tile.topic: Market Research, Data Platform

tile.title: Web of Science
tile.description:
Multidisciplinary citation index covering journals, conference proceedings, data sets, and
scholarly resources. Supports literature review, citation analysis, and research impact
assessment.
tile.topic: Scholarly Indexes & Literature

tile.title: World Development Indicators
tile.description:
World Bank database of global development indicators compiled from official country,
regional, and international sources. Supports development economics and comparative policy
research.
tile.topic: Government & International Statistics, Data Platform

tile.title: WRDS - Bank Regulatory Database
tile.description:
WRDS dataset containing accounting data for regulated U.S. depository institutions,
including bank holding companies, commercial banks, savings banks, and savings and loans.
tile.topic: Company & Organization Data, Data Platform
tile.access-note: A WRDS account is required to access this data.

tile.title: WRDS - Compustat
tile.description:
Comprehensive financial and accounting database covering publicly traded companies.
Includes income statements, balance sheets, cash flows, and company fundamentals for
quantitative research.
tile.topic: Company & Organization Data, Financial & Market Data, Trade & Supply Chain Data
tile.access-note: An individual WRDS account is required to access this data.

tile.title: WRDS - CRSP
tile.description:
Historical database of stock prices, returns, and trading activity for U.S. equity
markets. A foundational resource for finance and investment research.
tile.topic: Financial & Market Data, Historical Archives, Data Platform
tile.access-note: An individual WRDS account is required to access this data.

tile.title: WRDS - Infogroup U.S. Historical Businesses Data
tile.description:
Historical establishment-level database for U.S. businesses with location, industry, and
company records. Supports business demographics, economic geography, and longitudinal firm
research.
tile.topic: Company & Organization Data, Geospatial & Mapping Data, Historical Archives
tile.access-note:
An individual WRDS account is required to access this data. A subset of this data is
available in Data Axle (2003 - present). Previewing this data in Data Axle is encouraged.

tile.title: WRDS - Revelio
tile.description:
Workforce analytics dataset covering job postings, employee work histories, reviews, and
workforce dynamics. Supports labor market, human capital, and organizational research.
tile.topic: Company & Organization Data, Workforce & Career Data, Data Platform
tile.access-note: An individual WRDS account is required to access this data.

tile.title: WRDS - Wharton Research Data Service
tile.description:
Research platform providing access to financial, accounting, banking, economic, and market
datasets. Supports empirical research using licensed business and finance data.
tile.topic: Financial & Market Data, Data Platform

tile.title: WRDS- S&P Global ESG Scores
tile.description:
WRDS dataset containing S&P ESG scores, Trucost environmental data, and climate analytics.
Supports research on corporate sustainability, environmental impact, and climate risk.
tile.topic: ESG & Sustainability Data, Data Platform
tile.access-note: An individual WRDS account is required to access this data.
